name: Rebellion
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>造</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぞう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>反</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>はん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>劇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: During either player's Battle Phase: Target 1 monster your opponent controls; take control of it until the end of the Battle Phase, also other monsters you control cannot attack for the rest of this turn. You can only activate 1 "Rebellion" per turn.
eff: During either player's Battle Phase: Target 1 monster your opponent controls; take control of it until the end of the Battle Phase, also other monsters you control cannot attack for the rest of this turn. You can only activate 1 "Rebellion" per turn.

action: Takes control of an opponent's monster
